name: LOCK IN – Phone Guard
description: Blocks distracting websites when the camera catches you on your phone.

action.default_title: LOCK IN – Click to open detector

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://storage.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://tfhub.dev; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; worker-src blob: 'self'; img-src 'self' data:;
